what: Show the KnowledgeDetailPanel inline in the main content area when the user clicks an entry in the sidebar
why: User selected an entry from the knowledge sidebar and wants to view or edit its content

modes.view: All fields displayed as read-only text; Edit button and Delete button in top-right
modes.edit: All fields as editable inputs using EditForm; Save Changes + Cancel buttons; Delete button top-right
modes.confirm-delete: DeleteConfirmation component inline in panel — shows entry title, confirm and cancel buttons
modes.deleting: Spinner with SSE progress message from DELETE /api/knowledge/:id
modes.deleted: DeleteResult component inline — 'Back to Knowledge' button clears panel selection

success_handling.criteria: User saves changes to the entry; panel returns to view mode with updated data

decisions.rationale: The vault detail page has dedicated space for the knowledge panel; an inline panel is less disruptive than a modal dialog in this context

decisions.reason: View mode first, then edit mode on demand
decisions.rationale: User typically wants to read before editing; separating modes prevents accidental changes

decisions.reason: Make the entire entry row the click target instead of a separate Edit button
decisions.rationale: A small Edit button requires precise targeting and is invisible until hover. The whole row is a larger, always-visible hit area that is more discoverable and faster to click.

decisions.reason: Implement delete inline in KnowledgeDetailPanel instead of a separate KnowledgeDeleteDialog
decisions.rationale: The panel already owns the entry lifecycle (load, view, edit). Embedding delete (confirm-delete → deleting → deleted) avoids opening a second modal on top of the panel and keeps all state in one place. onDeleted callback clears selectedEntryId and reloads the sidebar.
